holidays.name: Christmas
holidays.description: Annual celebration on December 25. Peak gifting window: November 20 to December 25. Common gifts include toys, electronics, clothing, and food hampers.

holidays.name: Christmas
holidays.description: Annual celebration on December 25. Peak gifting window: November 20 to December 25. Common gifts include toys, electronics, clothing, and food hampers.

holidays.name: Valentine's Day
holidays.description: Annual celebration on February 14. Peak gifting window: January 25 to February 14. Common gifts include roses, chocolates, jewellery, and perfume for romantic partners.

holidays.name: Mother's Day
holidays.description: Second Sunday of May in the US. Peak gifting window: late April to second Sunday of May. Common gifts include flowers, spa sets, jewellery, and keepsakes for mothers.

holidays.name: Mothering Sunday
holidays.description: Fourth Sunday of Lent in the UK, typically falling in mid-to-late March. Peak gifting window starts three weeks before. Common gifts include flowers, chocolates, and spa items for mothers.

holidays.name: Father's Day
holidays.description: Third Sunday of June in the US. Peak gifting window: late May to third Sunday of June. Common gifts include gadgets, tools, sporting goods, and spirits for fathers.

holidays.name: Father's Day
holidays.description: Third Sunday of June in the UK. Peak gifting window: late May to third Sunday of June. Common gifts include gadgets, tools, sporting goods, and spirits for fathers.

holidays.name: Thanksgiving
holidays.description: Fourth Thursday of November in the US. Peak gifting window: early to mid-November. Common gifts include food hampers, wine, table items, and home goods expressing gratitude.
